tree.name: Javon Small
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MEM sent Marcus Smart and 2025 1st to WAS, Jake LaRavia to SAC; received Bagley, Johnny Davis, and this 2nd round pick (#48, Javon Small) from WAS
tree.note: West Virginia guard; pick acquired from WAS in Marcus Smart 3-team trade (Feb 6, 2025)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#48)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MEM sent Marcus Smart and 2025 1st (MEM own, became Walter Clayton Jr.) to WAS, Jake LaRavia to SAC; received Bagley, Johnny Davis, this 2nd round pick from WAS, and a 2028 2nd from SAC
assetsGivenUp.note: Washington's own 2025 2nd round pick, acquired in Marcus Smart 3-team trade
